assertions.text: Detects React as the web framework variant
assertions.evidence: Explicitly states 'Web (React) -- create-react-app produces a React single-page application that uses the CleverTap Web SDK.'
Response follows the skill workflow which loads core/integration/web.md. Contains detailed SDK-specific knowledge from the reference file (spa=true, event.push syntax, init pattern).
Shows useEffect(() => { clevertap.init('TEST-123-456', 'us1'); ... }, []) pattern in App.js.
Creates identifyUser() wrapper calling clevertap.onUserLogin.push({ 'Site': profile }) and full SignupForm component using it.

assertions.text: Includes event.push for page view tracking
assertions.evidence: Uses clevertap.event.push('Page Viewed', { 'Page Name': pageName, 'URL': window.location.href }) in trackPageView utility and PageTracker component.
